$doc: Claude Code delivery map for bin/leos-link.py (symlinks), bin/leos-block.py (@import blocks) + bin/leos-merge.py (fragments). 'links' are file/dir symlinks from the tool home into the leos-agent clone; 'blocks' are managed @import references appended into a host-owned markdown file (coexist, never clobber); 'merges' are files Claude Code rewrites, so they are merged not linked. Paths under `src`/`import` are clone-relative; `dest` is under $HOME.

links.note: private-runtime launcher for every Leo Python hook

blocks.note: managed @import block written by bin/leos-block.py — coexists with the user's own CLAUDE.md (never clobbers); Claude resolves @import natively, live on git pull

machineLocal.note: native=Opus subagent + external roster {GPT,GLM,Gemini,Grok}; written at setup
